spec.long_desc: A scruffy figure crouches near the old camp, picking through the remains with practiced efficiency.
spec.detailed_desc: This person has the hollow-cheeked look of someone who has been living rough for a while, their clothing a patched combination of things that once belonged to other people. They carry a knife they clearly know how to use and watch you with the calculating attention of someone always weighing risk. Not a soldier — an opportunist.
